name: docs
description: Generate and maintain standard project documentation from the codebase. Provides /docs:init, /docs:update, /docs:check, and /docs:changelog — all listed in the / menu. init reads existing docs (README/CHANGELOG/etc.) before optionally scanning the code (--scan docs|full), then generates docs/, AGENTS.md, and a CLAUDE.md that imports it (so Claude Code loads the agent instructions); existing files are never overwritten. changelog drafts Keep a Changelog notes from the branch diff against main, traces ticket numbers, and writes them to docs/changelog/YYYY/MM/DD/. The file-writing commands (init, update, changelog) preview their changes and ask for confirmation before writing; pass --yes to skip the prompt.
